completed_tasks.name: Launch gate matrix, secret-safety contract, production identifiers, and triage table
AWS and Snowflake readiness evidence templates
MDM hosted graph and dashboard-security evidence templates
Go-live roadmap, requirements, project, and state tracking update

remaining_tasks.name: Plan Phase 2: AWS and Snowflake Production Deployment Dry Run

blockers.description: Production app summary is absent: infra/aws-prod-application.json does not exist.
blockers.workaround: Phase 2 must require live production discovery or a successful production deploy before accepting AWS app readiness.

blockers.description: Production identifiers are not supplied yet.
blockers.workaround: Collect production AWS profile/account, Snowflake connection/database, warehouse and MDM digest image refs, app summary path, MDM secret names, and Native App app/compute-pool selector before production execution planning.

blockers.description: Dashboard README still documents active NEO4J_* setup paths in this checkout.
blockers.workaround: Complete/recheck the upstream neo4j-snowflake Phase 4 04-03 closeout before go-live dashboard docs can pass.

human_actions_pending.action: Provide or confirm production AWS and Snowflake identifiers before Phase 2 execution planning.
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 1 deliberately did not run production deployment or Snowflake checks.

decisions.rationale: All three plans have summaries, required artifacts exist, and 01-VERIFICATION.md has status passed.
Go-live requires separate production AWS/Snowflake/MDM/hosted graph/dashboard evidence.

decisions.decision: Production blockers stay BLOCKED until rerun proof exists.
decisions.rationale: No waivers are allowed in the launch gate matrix.
CLI, dbt, strict verify-graph, and AWS E2E remain acceptance gates.

next_action: Start with `$gsd-secure-phase 1 --ws go-live` if a formal security artifact is required, otherwise run `$gsd-plan-phase 2 --ws go-live` and use the Phase 1 matrix as the gate contract.
context_notes: This handoff replaces stale root handoff content from older work. Branch workspace/go-live is clean at the time of handoff creation before committing this file. Keep all work under the go-live workstream unless a later phase explicitly scopes source or runbook edits.
